episodes.title: New Mexico Rep to Trump on Epstein: "We're coming for you"
episodes.description: What is Trump hiding in the Epstein files? In this episode of Gloves Off, Tara McGowan sits down with Congresswoman Melanie Stansbury, a member of the House Oversight Committee leading the charge to uncover the truth behind the Epstein files. Rep. Stansbury digs into the missing files and DOJ obstruction, the push to subpoena Attorney General Pam Bondi and forcing Trump himself to testify. She also breaks down the groundbreaking investigation happening in New Mexico, where the state legislature has launched the Epstein Truth Commission and reopened criminal investigations into Epstein’s infamous Zorro Ranch. Follow Gloves Off and listen wherever you get your podcasts. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

episodes.title: The Epstein War: Trump’s Latest Distraction
episodes.description:
The Democrats have been letting the Trump Administration walk all over them, playing a game with outdated rules that no longer apply. But are the actions of the White House symbolic of a “last gasp” of capitalism and the patriarchy as we know it? And is there a way for Dems to stand up and take advantage of it?

Today’s guest is Leigh McGowan, AKA PoliticsGirl, a writer, journalist, and online opinion maker dedicated to helping people reconnect to politics and realize how what is happening on a national and global scale affects them. All too familiar with going viral for a rant on CNN and the nightmare that is the online state of political discussion, McGowan joins host Tara McGowan (no relation) to discuss the reality of modern-day politics, how Democrats are failing to adapt, and what the worst case scenarios under the Trump administration might look like. 

You can find Leigh at @PoliticsGirl  and you can get more from Tara at @taramcgowanri on Instagram.

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#epstein #iran #epsteinfiles #trump
